title: Senior Analyst Brand & Market (w/m/d) - Corporate Brands
required_skills: Degree in business administration, supply chain management or comparable field
Experience in supply chain, demand planning, or order management
Structured data analysis and accuracy focus
missing_skills: Supply chain management experience — not in CV at all
Demand planning / order management / inventory management experience
core_responsibilities: Monitor KPIs for demand forecasting and stock availability
Develop order volume planning tools and consolidate demand inputs
Manage stock lifecycle and master data
Calculate order requirements at SKU level
Establish rolling forecasts for strategic suppliers
recommended_emphasis: NOTE: Despite the title 'Brand & Market Analyst', this role is a Supply Chain / Demand Planning analyst — not a brand or marketing analytics role
Score is below threshold (30) — CV has no supply chain or demand planning background
Not aligned with CV's marketing/analytics focus
Recommend discussing with user whether to skip

company_info.size_raw: Douglas — Europe's leading beauty retailer, international company
